results.title: Skin cancer in Sabah: A small lesion that should not be missed
results.description: SKIN cancer is often associated with fear, disfigurement, and difficult treatment. Yet in many cases, it does not begin in a dramatic way. It may first appear as a small, quiet, and painless lesion that seems harmless enough to ignore. Because it may look minor and remain asymptomatic for some time, patients may delay seeking [...] The post Skin cancer in Sabah: A small lesion that should not be missed appeared first on Borneo Post Online .
